caribbean.headline: Moderate Winds and Showers Impact Bimini Today
caribbean.paragraph: Bimini is experiencing moderate northeast winds sustained at 22 knots with seas up to 4 feet and a dominant swell period of 6 seconds. Rain chances are high at 76 percent, creating locally reduced visibility and wet conditions for mariners and port operations.

mediterranean.headline: Strong Winds and High Waves Impact Haifa Port Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Haifa is experiencing sustained winds of 21 knots with wave heights reaching 11.2 feet and a dominant WNW swell direction at an 8-second period. Rain probability is elevated at 73 percent, creating challenging conditions for marine operations in the Eastern Mediterranean.
